title: Doctoral student named research coordinator for Holmes Scholar Council
summary_en: Jayla Langford, doctoral student in Higher Education and Student Affairs, has been elected by peers across the United States, and will lead efforts to advance the scholarly mission of the Holmes Scholars Program by supporting research, publications, and conference participation.
title_cn: 印第安纳大学伯明顿分校博士生杰拉·兰福德当选霍姆斯学者理事会2026-2027学年研究协调员
